text: I feel an odd sense of unease in this dimly lit, quiet environment. There is a sterile, almost clinical emptiness here, accentuated by the harsh ceiling lights and the empty glassed room. The red fire hose and emergency marker add an undercurrent of potential urgency. The darkness beyond the glass and the abstract writing on the blue wall evoke a terrain between abandonment and anticipation. I am alone, teetering between curiosity and caution, with silence pressing in all around me.
